0.name: SE2 Frontend Foundation + ethskills Setup
0.notes: Next.js 14 + TailwindCSS + 30 SE2 files cherry-picked. Debug Contracts at /debug. RainbowKit wallet UI. Hero landing page. 6 ethskills docs fetched. externalContracts.ts with 7 Base addresses. Foundry bridge script. DESIGN.md tokens in tailwind.config.ts. 31 TS errors expected (resolve post-deploy). npm run dev starts clean, build passes.

1.name: Foundry Setup + AgentRegistry
1.notes: Bootstrap: Foundry 1.5.1, forge build clean, 24/24 tests pass, tsc --noEmit clean. Fixed tokenId=0 sentinel bug, Ownable imports, Settled enum, ERC20Mock, types.ts. All 3 contracts compile and tested.

2.name: TrustNFT (ERC-7857 iNFT)
2.notes: TrustNFT.sol compiles and passes 10/10 tests. tokenId sentinel fixed. Score formula fixed. Transfer lock (SBT) enforced. ERC-7857 iNFT pattern ready for 0G integration.

3.name: ServiceAgreement (Escrow)
3.notes: ServiceAgreement.sol compiles and passes 6/6 tests. Full lifecycle (create→accept→fulfill→settle), cancel, dispute. Settled enum added. Ready for Uniswap payment + KeeperHub execution.

4.name: Deploy Script + Base Deployment
4.notes: Deployed 3 contracts to Base Sepolia (chain 84532, block 40853462). AgentRegistry=0x6CE3d4bf7C7140924C6AB7579b8B86Dc9ebF7a02, ServiceAgreement=0xC9caAA6d70B8B2F73D96d7154cb8c2c97eC16bb4, TrustNFT=0x92F725c404d355645d5daf9D7ab7967f2f15A952. All 3 source-verified on Basescan. foundry-bridge.js generated deployedContracts.ts (2234 lines, full ABIs). tsc --noEmit 0 errors (31 TS errors resolved). npm run build clean. Repo sanitized: .a0proj/ removed from git tracking, added to .gitignore. Gas: 0.0000246 ETH (4.1M gas). Private key via project secrets only (never in plaintext).

5.name: Gensyn AXL Integration
5.notes: RESEARCH COMPLETE. AXL is Go binary with HTTP REST (5 endpoints). No JS/TS SDK. Need: 1) Build 2 AXL Go nodes, 2) AXLClient TS HTTP wrapper (replace node-config.ts), 3) CORS proxy (Nginx/Cloudflare), 4) ACK layer for fire-and-forget /send, 5) Integration test across nodes. Bootstrap peers: tls://34.46.48.224:9001, tls://136.111.135.206:9001. Prize: $2.5K/$1.5K/$1K. See docs/reference/gensyn-axl-deep-research.md

6.name: Agent Implementations + ENS
6.notes: Requester + Provider agent scaffolds exist. ENS setup scripts exist. Need real implementation and ENS integration.

7.name: Uniswap + KeeperHub Integration
7.notes: Fill FEEDBACK.md as you go. SDK modules exist but untested.
